items.title: CVE-2026-54006
items.summary: CVE-2026-54006 is a broken access control (IDOR-style) vulnerability in Open WebUI versions prior to 0.9.6. The event update endpoint validates write access to the event's current calendar but fails to authorize the destination calendar_id in the request body, allowing a regular user to move events into any other user's calendar if they know its ID. The flaw is fixed in version 0.9.6.
